content:
# Session 25 (iter-025) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- SNAP sorries (`SectionGradedRing.lean`): **5 ‚Üí 4**. Global: 9 ‚Üí 8 (4 œá in `QuotScheme.lean` untouched/deferred; out-of-cone `RelativeSpec.lean` merge artifacts unchanged).
- Target: B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` succ case (8-iter plateau 017‚Üí024). **CLOSED, axiom-clean.**
- Files edited: `SectionGradedRing.lean` only (+ prover's own memory files).
- Build: GREEN (2439 jobs). Goal seed `Grassmannian.represents` untouched + DELIVERED.

## HEADLINE ‚Äî B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` FULLY CLOSED (plateau broken)
The prover executed the plan's generic-`M` close. Found the core proves in **one** clean tactic
chain ‚Äî staging into sub-lemmas (plan directive) proved unnecessary.

- **NEW `private lemma tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core {M}[Category M][MonoidalCategory M]`** (~L3072):
  the succ-case canonical pentagon as a generic-monoidal-`M` statement (~17 bridge isos, 6 `Œº`
  morphisms, `foldhyp`, `hŒº5`). Proof:
  `rw [hŒº5]` ‚Üí `foldhyp' := (cancel_epi iABCL.inv).mp foldhyp` ‚Üí `simp only [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc, inv_hom_whiskerRight_assoc]` ‚Üí `rw [foldhyp']` ‚Üí `simp only [comp_whiskerRight, whiskerLeft_comp, hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc, whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc]` ‚Üí `rw [‚Üê associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc]` ‚Üí `simp only [whisker_assoc, whisker_exchange_assoc]` ‚Üí `monoidal`.
  - Built in generic `M` (single category instance ‚áí the `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules`
    comp-instance diamond is **absent** during development) ‚áí `lean_run_code` iterated fast.
  - `lean_verify`: axioms `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` ‚Äî clean.
- **Succ-branch wiring** (~L3251): `exact tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core (M := LocalizedMonoidal (sheafificationMon X) (sheafificationW X) (localizationUnitIso X)) (‚Ä¶ 5 goal-only isos explicit ‚Ä¶) (foldhyp := ihRh) (hŒº5 := hŒº5)` under `set_option maxRecDepth 4000 in` (stack-depth bound, NOT the forbidden heartbeat bump). `exact`'s `isDefEq` crosses the rfl-defeq diamond that `rw`/`simp`/`erw`/`hc`-bridge all failed on (iters 018‚Äì024). `hŒº5` is the 2nd-index succ-unfold of the right comparison atom `Œº_{m,m'+(c+1)}`.
- **Verified first-hand:** `lean_verify` on `tensorPowAdd_assoc` ‚Üí `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, no `sorryAx`; statement un-weakened (‚àÄ `L : X.Modules`, no `[IsInvertible]`, full 3-index pentagon).

### Key insight
`monoidal` ALONE stalls on this goal ‚Äî it cannot peel the non-structural `Œº`-atoms nor cancel the
opaque `tensorObjIso`-bridge pairs. It only fires after the explicit fold (`foldhyp'` = `ihRh`) +
ONE `associator_inv_naturality_left` + `whisker_exchange`. The generic-`M` abstraction is what makes
the whole simp+`monoidal` telescope fire (one uniform `‚â´` head, no diamond).

## Remaining sorries (4 SNAP)
- **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (B7, L3289)** ‚Äî now the SOLE in-cone open target. Ingredients (1)=B5 and
  (3)=B6 are BOTH done; only ingredient (2) ‚Äî the `Œº`-slide naturality of whiskered `sectionsMul`
  (general `Œì(Œº)` in place of a single `Œ∑`, analogue of B2/B3) ‚Äî remains to build, then assemble
  mirroring `sectionsMul_mul_one`. Not attempted this iter (full budget on B6).
- **3 invertibility-gated comm** (`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` L3307,
  `tensorPowAdd_comm` L3322, `sectionsMul_mul_comm` L3364) ‚Äî honest typed sorries, signatures
  correctly `[IsInvertible L]`-gated; `sectionsMul_mul_comm` is FALSE for general `L`. No consumer.
  Plan agent must NOT re-assign.

## Verification (both highly-recommended dispatched ‚Äî prover touched the file)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter025` ‚Äî **PASS, 0 red flags**, 6 decls. `tensorPowAdd_assoc`
  faithful (‚àÄL, no `IsInvertible`, 2nd-index braiding-free), axiom-clean, fully proved.
  `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core` helper-exempt. 4 sorries honest, no proof-side `\leanok` claimed.
  Minor: bundled `lem:sectionMul_coherent` `\lean{}` block mixes the 2 closed unit laws with the 2
  open assoc/comm laws ‚áí sync can't credit finished halves (pre-existing bundling artifact).
- **lean-auditor** `iter025` ‚Äî proof-correct, **0 critical / 4 major / 1 minor**. All proofs genuine,
  no `sorryAx`/`axiom`/`native_decl`/laundering; `maxRecDepth 4000` + both `maxHeartbeats 800000`
  legitimate (not 1e6). **4 majors = STALE history comments** (succ-branch L3181‚Äì3207
  "REMAINING BLOCKER"/"NEXT" still describe B6 as blocked; `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` body L3278/3285‚Äì3288
  call B4/B6 sorries when both now proved). 1 minor = inaccurate "top of this file" cross-ref L2534‚Äì2535.
  NOT proof defects ‚Äî routed to recommendations (review cannot edit `.lean`).

## ‚úÖ sync_leanok behaved correctly this iter (11-iter over-strip streak BROKEN)
`sync_leanok-state.json` iter-25 (sha 51c0b85): **added 2, removed 0, no corruption.** The
`lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc` proof block now correctly carries `\leanok` (sync addition). No manual
`\leanok` repair or LaTeX-corruption fix needed this iter ‚Äî the first clean sync in 11 iters. The
durable sync-side fix remains worthwhile (see recommendations) but the defect did not manifest.

## Blueprint doctor (unchanged, all out-of-cone merge artifacts)
`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` covers 2 nonexistent files + broken `\ref`s; `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`
/ `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` broken `\cref`/`\uses`. All pre-existing EXTRACTION artifacts outside the
3-seed cone (unchanged iters 011‚Üí025). Deferred to merge-back. No active-chapter (Picard_SectionGradedRing)
finding.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. sync added the `lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc` proof-block `\leanok` correctly; no override needed.

## Recommendations (next iter)
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: pivot to **B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`** ‚Äî build ingredient (2)
`Œº`-slide helper, assemble; have the prover sweep the stale history comments the auditor flagged.
